response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist with 15+ years of software engineering experience and clear staff-level ownership across multiple companies, but the role requires deep, demonstrated GenAI expertise that his resume only partially supports. His current work at re:cinq explicitly covers MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is directly on-point, and his background in high-throughput data pipelines and distributed systems provides a relevant foundation. However, Python is entirely absent from his skill set despite being a primary required language, there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/optimization work, and his GenAI experience is concentrated in roughly one year at re:cinq rather than the required 8+ years. The MCP and agentic infrastructure angle is compelling enough to warrant a screening conversation to probe depth, but the technical gaps are substantial.
strengths: Direct, current hands-on experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq aligns precisely with the role's core AI infrastructure focus.
15+ years of polyglot, staff-level engineering with TypeScript and demonstrated ability to ship production systems at scale across cloud (AWS CDK), micro-services, and data-pipeline contexts.
Strong track record of knowledge transfer — workshops, talks (FOSS4G), Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos — supports the mentoring and engineering-excellence responsibilities of the role.
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the listed skills, yet it is the primary required language for building AI-driven solutions in this role.
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM performance metrics, or evaluation pipeline design — the specialized GenAI depth the role explicitly requires.
AI/GenAI work is limited to the current position (approximately 13 months as of today), far short of the 8-year minimum for production-grade AI solution development.

key_factors.factor: No RAG or vector DB experience
